title: Senior Frontend Developer at Narayana Health Digital

jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at Narayana Health Digital
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Narayana Health Digital! We are hiring a Frontend Developer for our Gwalior team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Narayana Health Digital:
Narayana Health Digital is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Narayana Health Digital!
